title: Shiva Temple, Kera
tagline: Shiva Temple, Kera — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: The Shiva temple, Kera, also known as Lakheshwara temple of Kerakot, is located in Kera village near Bhuj of Kutch district in Gujarat, India.
overview.description: The Shiva temple, Kera, also known as Lakheshwara temple of Kerakot, is located in Kera village near Bhuj of Kutch district in Gujarat, India. The temple was built during the reign of the Chaulukya dynasty (Solankis) in the later part of the 10th Century (9th to 11th century) and is dedicated to Shiva. The temple has been subjected to severe earthquake damage during the earthquake of 1819 and the Bhuj earthquake of 2001. But the temple's spire, inner sanctum and the sculptures are still in an attractive condition.

topPlaces.name: Kera, Kutch
topPlaces.description: Kera is a village in Bhuj Taluka of Kutch district of Gujarat, India.this historical town was ruled by the jadeja's before independence in 1947. This historical town has several places of interest; the most important part of the town's history the Darbar gadh, the ruins of an old fort and Shiva temple, and the shrine of a Muslim saint Ghulam Ali.

topPlaces.name: Meghpur, Bhuj
topPlaces.description: Meghpur is a village in Kutch, state of Gujarat in western India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shiva Temple, Kera?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shiva Temple, Kera is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shiva Temple, Kera?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jamnagar Airport (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (151 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shiva Temple, Kera?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shiva Temple, Kera at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shiva Temple, Kera?
faq.a: Stays in Shiva Temple, Kera start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shiva Temple, Kera?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kera, Kutch, Meghpur, Bhuj.
